notes: v0.14.5 — Four SHARD ship skins: PRISM (default, free), CIPHER (free, second loadout), VOID (10,000 PULSE shop), NEXUS (10,000 PULSE shop). New SHIP SKINS strip on the CLASS page — 4 tiles in a row with preview thumb, description, and status chip (ACTIVE / EQUIP / 10,000 PULSE). Click owned skin to equip, click locked skin with enough PULSE to buy and auto-equip. Premium skins also surface in the SHOP below the boss-key card. Active skin + unlock list persist across restarts; free PRISM + CIPHER are force-unlocked on every load even from older saves. Cosmetic only — no gameplay impact. Windows only.
